summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Pakistan Intelligence Monitor - all backend APIs and frontend dashboard components working properly. Fixed critical MapSection component async import issue.

minor_issues.description: External preview URL returns 404 for all endpoints, but localhost works perfectly

fixed_issues.issue: MapLibre async import causing Popup undefined errors
fixed_issues.fix_applied: Restructured useEffect to handle async maplibre-gl import properly

passed_tests: Backend /api/health endpoint - returns healthy status
Backend /api/news endpoint - returns Pakistan news from RSS feeds with proper structure
Backend /api/economic endpoint - returns economic indicators (PKR rates, KSE-100, inflation)
Backend /api/weather endpoint - returns weather for Pakistani cities
Backend /api/security endpoint - returns security alerts with proper structure
Backend /api/regional endpoint - returns regional relations data
Backend /api/infrastructure endpoint - returns infrastructure status
Backend /api/map-data endpoint - returns map markers for Pakistani cities
Frontend dashboard loads with all panels (News, Economic, Security, Weather, Regional, Infrastructure, Map)
Map section displays Pakistan overview with city markers and legend
News panel shows live RSS feeds from Pakistani sources
Economic panel displays PKR exchange rates, KSE-100, inflation data
Weather panel shows temperature data for major cities
Security panel shows political and security alerts
Regional relations panel shows Pakistan's diplomatic status
Infrastructure panel shows power, internet, transport status
Refresh button functionality working properly
Real-time clock display in header
Footer with version information and last update time
Dark theme with Pakistan green (#22C55E) accents properly implemented
All panels have proper data-testid attributes for testing
No console errors or runtime errors after fix
Backend-Frontend integration working seamlessly

success_percentage.backend: 100% - All 8 API endpoints working with proper data structure validation
success_percentage.frontend: 100% - All dashboard components loading and functioning properly
